markets.rules_primary: If Jay-Z releases a new album in 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
A “new album”,  must be an original
composition first released during  2026, including new singles, unreleased
tracks, or collaborations featuring new material. It may take the form of an LP or EP.
Re-recordings (unless in a new language), remasters, radio edits, clean or explicit releases
of the same underlying track(s), remixes, live versions, acoustic versions, instrumentals,
demos, alternative takes, “artist version”-style releases, or any other full reproduction of a
song already available on Spotify before || Time period || does NOT meet the Payout
Criterion. Additionally, uploading albums that have not previously been available on
Spotify but have been widely publicly available before <time period> does NOT meet the
Payout Criterion for a “new album”
markets.title: Will Jay-Z release a new album in 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if formal charges are filed.
markets.rules_primary: If Keith Ellison has been formally charged with a federal crime  after Issuance and before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Charges filed in military courts are included. The reinstatement of charges filed prior to Issuance does not count; only the filing of a new charging document after Issuance triggers the Payout Criterion.


Formal charges require the filing of a criminal complaint, information, or indictment with an appropriate court. Arrests without charges, being named as a target of investigation, civil lawsuits, and administrative actions do not constitute charges. Traffic violations that don't require court appearances and sealed charges that remain sealed through the deadline also don't count. If charges are filed and then dismissed before the deadline, the market still resolves to Yes. Pre-trial diversion agreements involving formal charges count as charges. For groups of individuals, charges against any member of the specified group trigger the criterion.
markets.title: Will Keith Ellison be charged with a any crime before Jan 1, 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close after Ryan Busse wins the party's nomination.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the executive action is issued.
markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump has taken any executive action revoking, terminating, or rescinding the suspension of entry for nationals of Haiti, Iran, Côte d'Ivoire, or Senegal before the World Cup, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The qualifying action must be of the specific type designated (executive order, presidential memorandum, proclamation, directive, determination, or finding), be signed by the President personally during the specified time period, and explicitly address the topic in the document's operative provisions, title, or official White House summary. Actions must have legal or policy effect - ceremonial proclamations without policy impact do not qualify unless specifically included. Actions that only incidentally mention the topic, statements without formal action, actions by cabinet members, legislative proposals without executive action, and signing statements do not qualify. The action must be publicly announced or documented by a Source Agency before expiration.
markets.title: Will Donald Trump issue any executive action on revoking, terminating, or rescinding the suspension of entry for nationals of Haiti, Iran, Côte d'Ivoire, or Senegal before the World Cup?

markets.rules_primary: If Jon Favreau performs / is announced as Happy Hogan in Avengers: Doomsday, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
For the purposes of this Contract, Jon Favreau satisfies the Payout Criterion if either:

Official Announcement:
Jon Favreau is officially announced, confirmed, or publicly credited as cast to perform Happy Hogan in Avengers: Doomsday, regardless of whether the performance ultimately occurs; OR

Actual Performance:
Jon Favreau appears on stage, on screen, or in recorded content as Happy Hogan in any official performance, showing, or release of Avengers: Doomsday.

Additional clarification(s):

If Avengers: Doomsday is entirely cancelled or abandoned before any official performance or release occurs, but Jon Favreau was officially announced in Happy Hogan, the Contract will resolve to “Yes.”

If multiple people are announced for Happy Hogan (e.g., alternating cast, dual casting), and Jon Favreau is among them, the Contract will resolve to “Yes.” [b][c]

The Contract may resolve to “No” prior to the Expiration Date if:
(a) Avengers: Doomsday is cancelled or completes its run without Jon Favreau being announced or performing in Happy Hogan, or
(b) another person is officially announced as the sole exclusive performer for Happy Hogan.
markets.title: Will Jon Favreau perform as Happy Hogan in Avengers: Doomsday?

markets.rules_primary: If Rosamund Pike performs/ is announced as The Villain in the next James Bond film, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
For the purposes of this Contract, Rosamund Pike satisfies the Payout Criterion if either:

Official Announcement:
Rosamund Pike is officially announced, confirmed, or publicly credited as cast to perform The Villain in the next James Bond film, regardless of whether the performance ultimately occurs; OR

Actual Performance:
Rosamund Pike appears on stage, on screen, or in recorded content as The Villain in any official performance, showing, or release of the next James Bond film.

Additional clarification(s):

If the next James Bond film is entirely cancelled or abandoned before any official performance or release occurs, but Rosamund Pike was officially announced in The Villain, the Contract will resolve to “Yes.”

If multiple people are announced for The Villain (e.g., alternating cast, dual casting), and Rosamund Pike is among them, the Contract will resolve to “Yes.” [b][c]

The Contract may resolve to “No” prior to the Expiration Date if:
(a) the next James Bond film is cancelled or completes its run without Rosamund Pike being announced or performing in The Villain, or
(b) another person is officially announced as the sole exclusive performer for The Villain.
markets.title: Will Rosamund Pike perform as Villain in the next James Bond film?

For the purposes of this Contract, Adam Driver satisfies the Payout Criterion if either:

Official Announcement:
Adam Driver is officially announced, confirmed, or publicly credited as cast to perform The Villain in the next James Bond film, regardless of whether the performance ultimately occurs; OR

Actual Performance:
Adam Driver appears on stage, on screen, or in recorded content as The Villain in any official performance, showing, or release of the next James Bond film.

Additional clarification(s):

If the next James Bond film is entirely cancelled or abandoned before any official performance or release occurs, but Adam Driver was officially announced in The Villain, the Contract will resolve to “Yes.”

If multiple people are announced for The Villain (e.g., alternating cast, dual casting), and Adam Driver is among them, the Contract will resolve to “Yes.” [b][c]

The Contract may resolve to “No” prior to the Expiration Date if:
(a) the next James Bond film is cancelled or completes its run without Adam Driver being announced or performing in The Villain, or
(b) another person is officially announced as the sole exclusive performer for The Villain.
markets.title: Will Adam Driver perform as Villain in the next James Bond film?

If multiple people are announced for Q (e.g., alternating cast, dual casting), and Richard Ayoade is among them, the Contract will resolve to “Yes.” [b][c]

The Contract may resolve to “No” prior to the Expiration Date if:
(a) the next James Bond film is cancelled or completes its run without Richard Ayoade being announced or performing in Q, or
(b) another person is officially announced as the sole exclusive performer for Q.
markets.title: Will Richard Ayoade perform as Q in the next James Bond film?

Evidence must be reported by at least one Source Agency and may include official announcements, news reports with specific location details, verified photographs/videos at identifiable locations, flight records showing arrival, completed official schedules, or social media posts from official accounts. Visits that began before market issuance do not count. For multiple locations with OR logic, visiting any single location satisfies the criterion. For AND logic, all locations must be visited.
markets.title: Will Reza Pahlavi visit Iran before Jan 1, 2027?

Sarcastic statements or those immediately clarified as jokes do not qualify.

markets.rules_secondary: An agreement also made with other countries (i.e. multilaterally) is still encompassed if the United States participates. "A new Iran-US nuclear deal" means a formal written agreement signed by authorized representatives of both the United States and Iran that (1) imposes verifiable restrictions on Iran's nuclear program, including limits on uranium enrichment, centrifuge numbers, or nuclear facility operations, AND (2) provides for the lifting, suspension, or modification of at least one US economic sanction on Iran in exchange for Iran's nuclear commitments.
markets.title: Will the US agree to a new Iranian nuclear deal this year?

markets.title: Will the United States recognize Reza Pahlavi as the leader of Iran in 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the specific individual leaves the role as defined in the payout criteria.
markets.rules_primary: If Cory Mills leaves the House before the midterms, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Cory Mills must have an actual departure date and vacate the role within the time period. 


If the person leaves the role due to death (i.e., if the person dies while holding the role), all contracts on the person may resolve to the last fair price as determined in the sole discretion of the Exchange. Temporary leaves of absence, suspensions, or recusals do not constitute leaving, resigning from, or retiring from the role unless the individual formally and permanently ceases to hold the position. If the person vacates the role and then re-occupies the role, the contract may settle on the initial vacation of the role. If the role otherwise ceases to exist with no plausible successor, the contract may resolve to "No."



For "leave," cessation of holding the role qualifies, including resignation, retirement, removal, expiration of term without renewal, recall, or other means by which the individual no longer occupies the role—this includes both voluntary early departure AND the natural expiration of a term.
markets.title: Will Cory Mills leave the House before the midterms?

markets.rules_primary: If Avengers: Doomsday's release is delayed past December 18, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will Avengers: Doomsday be delayed?

markets.rules_primary: If Xochitl Gomez performs / is announced as America Chavez in Avengers: Doomsday, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
For the purposes of this Contract, Xochitl Gomez satisfies the Payout Criterion if either:

Official Announcement:
Xochitl Gomez is officially announced, confirmed, or publicly credited as cast to perform America Chavez in Avengers: Doomsday, regardless of whether the performance ultimately occurs; OR

Actual Performance:
Xochitl Gomez appears on stage, on screen, or in recorded content as America Chavez in any official performance, showing, or release of Avengers: Doomsday.

Additional clarification(s):

If Avengers: Doomsday is entirely cancelled or abandoned before any official performance or release occurs, but Xochitl Gomez was officially announced in America Chavez, the Contract will resolve to “Yes.”

If multiple people are announced for America Chavez (e.g., alternating cast, dual casting), and Xochitl Gomez is among them, the Contract will resolve to “Yes.” [b][c]

The Contract may resolve to “No” prior to the Expiration Date if:
(a) Avengers: Doomsday is cancelled or completes its run without Xochitl Gomez being announced or performing in America Chavez, or
(b) another person is officially announced as the sole exclusive performer for America Chavez.
markets.title: Will Xochitl Gomez perform as America Chavez in Avengers: Doomsday?

markets.rules_primary: If a bill becomes law that imposes an excise tax on investment firm ownership of single-family homes (including if the tax is only imposed on newly bought homes) or bans investment firms from owning single-family homes outright (or which bans buying new homes) before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: An example of such a bill is here. Such legislation can have an assets under management or net value requirement for the funds and still be included within the Payout Criterion (e.g. it only applies to funds with assets under management of at least $50 million). Such legislation may also only tax certain assets, e.g. only second and third homes but not first owned by a firm.
markets.subtitle: Before Jan 1, 2027
markets.title: Will a bill become law taxing or banning hedge funds from owning homes before election day?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early when the winner is announced.
markets.rules_primary: If Stingray is officially declared the winner of The Masked Singer: Season 14 before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The winner must be officially announced in the finale or via official channels immediately following. Multiple joint winners each resolve to Yes with split payouts ($1 divided by number of winners). If no winner is declared, all markets resolve to No. Winners who decline the award still count unless acceptance was a condition of victory. Disqualifications or withdrawals before the finale resolve to No. Later title stripping doesn't affect resolution - the original finale announcement governs. Fan favorite or other secondary awards don't count as winning. For couples/teams competitions, being part of the winning unit counts.
markets.title: Will Stingray win The Masked Singer: Season 14?

markets.rules_secondary: The winner must be officially announced in the finale or via official channels immediately following. markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the endorsement occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Lisa Murkowski publicly endorses Mary Peltola in the 2026 Alaska Senate election before Nov 3, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: An endorsement requires a clear, affirmative statement of support for the nominee's election. The statement must be public (not private communications) and specifically reference the race or be clearly in context of the race. The endorsement must come directly from the person or through their official channels. Positive comments without explicit support, policy endorsements without nominee endorsement, or conditional endorsements do not qualify. Social media endorsements count only from verified accounts, and likes or retweets alone do not constitute endorsement. Quote tweets with additional supportive commentary do count. Sarcastic statements or those immediately clarified as jokes do not qualify.
markets.title: Will Lisa Murkowski endorse Mary Peltola in 2026 Alaska Senate election before Nov 3, 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If the United States gains control of any territory outside its sovereignty as of Issuance before Jan 21, 2029, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: An announcement by the United States and the entity that controls the territory that it will happen is also encompassed by the Payout Criterion. The territory must come under formal governance or jurisdiction of the United States, either as a state, territory, or other classification within the US system, where it was not previously. Merely leasing a given part in territory – for example, setting up a military base on leased territory – is not encompassed by the Payout Criterion.
markets.title: Will the United States acquire any territory not under its sovereignty (as of Issuance) before Jan 21, 2029?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the U.S. State Department issues a qualifying advisory for the specific country.
markets.rules_primary: If the U.S. State Department issues, updates, or reaffirms a Level 4 travel advisory for Taiwan after Issuance and before Jan 1, 2030, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Advisories dated for future events must be effective before Jan 1, 2030 to qualify. The category level must be the one that applies to the whole country, rather than a particular region, unless the country rulebook variable in this case refers to a region. A Travel Advisory is considered "issued" when it appears on the official State Department travel advisories website with an official publication date.


 A Level 4 travel advisory means "Do not travel" and is the highest advisory level due to life-threatening risks.
markets.title: Will the U.S. State Department issue a Level 4 warning for Taiwan before Jan 1, 2030?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if formal charges are filed.
markets.rules_primary: If any California statewide elected official or Governor's cabinet member has been federally charged with fraud after Issuance and before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Formal charges require the filing of a criminal complaint, information, or indictment with an appropriate court. Arrests without charges, being named as a target of investigation, civil lawsuits, and administrative actions do not constitute charges. Traffic violations that don't require court appearances and sealed charges that remain sealed through the deadline also don't count. If charges are filed and then dismissed before the deadline, the market still resolves to Yes. Pre-trial diversion agreements involving formal charges count as charges. For groups of individuals, charges against any member of the specified group trigger the criterion.
markets.title: Will California statewide elected official or Governor's cabinet member be charged with a fraud crime before Jan 1, 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the specified word or phrase is stated by President Trump.
markets.rules_primary: If Whack Job / Wack Job, or a plural or possessive form of Whack Job / Wack Job, is stated by Donald Trump before Apr 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The word or phrase must be stated by President Donald Trump in public statements, direct quotes published by Source Agencies, or written public statements on his personal social media accounts (Twitter/Truth Social). Official acts like Executive Orders or bills signed do not count. Grammatical inflections for plurals and possessives are included (e.g., "immigrant" includes "immigrants" and "immigrant's"), but other tense inflections, hyphenated compounds, and synonyms are not included. For phrases with slashes like "Doge/Dogecoin," either word satisfies the criterion. If the word must be said a minimum number of times, all instances must occur after market issuance.
markets.title: Will Trump say "Whack Job / Wack Job" before Apr 1, 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the role status becomes definitively determined.
markets.rules_primary: If Juan Guaidó officially holds the position of the head of state of Venezuela on Dec 31, 2026 at 10:00 AM ET, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
For the purposes of this contract, "officially holds" means any of the following:

- Juan Guaidó has been formally appointed, confirmed (if confirmation is required), and sworn in as the head of state of Venezuela
- Juan Guaidó is listed in official government directories, organizational charts, or equivalent authoritative sources as the head of state of Venezuela
- Juan Guaidó is actively serving as the head of state of Venezuela with full authority and responsibilities (not suspended, on leave, or in acting/interim capacity unless explicitly specified)

The following do **NOT** constitute "officially holding" the role:

- Nominated, announced, or designated as the head of state of Venezuela but appointment not yet effective
- Appointed with an effective date *after* Dec 31, 2026
- Previously served as the head of state of Venezuela but term has expired, resigned, or been terminated before Dec 31, 2026
- Serving as the head of state of Venezuela in a consultant, contractor, or unofficial capacity
- Named as successor or heir apparent to the head of state of Venezuela but not yet appointed
- Holding a different role with oversight of the head of state of Venezuela but not the specified position itself
markets.title: Will Juan Guaidó be the head of state of Venezuela on Dec 31, 2026?

markets.title: Will Miguel Rodríguez Torres be the head of state of Venezuela on Dec 31, 2026?

custom_strike.Bill: legislation that channels government funds directly into HSAs and/or FSAs

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If legislation that channels government funds directly into HSAs and/or FSAs has become law before May 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The bill must pass the full chamber (not just committee) for House or Senate passage. For "become law" markets, the bill must be signed by the President or become law through veto override. Presidential pocket vetoes that expire resolve to No. Joint resolutions are treated as bills. Treaties require two-thirds Senate approval for passage. The market resolves based on the first occurrence of the specified milestone.
markets.title: Will legislation that channels government funds directly into HSAs and/or FSAs become law before May 1, 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If New York City’s congestion relief fee (the “Central Business District Tolling Program”) has ended, or its fee has been set to $0, after Issuance and before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: An announcement (or, for example, legislation forcing it) that it will end is sufficient to resolve the market to Yes, even if that has not yet taken effect. A pause or injunction on the congestion pricing toll is not sufficient to resolve this market to Yes.
markets.title: Will congestion pricing in NYC end in 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the U.S. State Department issues a qualifying advisory for the specific country.
markets.rules_primary: If the U.S. State Department issues, updates, or reaffirms a level 3 or lower travel advisory for Yemen after Issuance and before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Advisories dated for future events must be effective before Jan 1, 2027 to qualify. The category level must be the one that applies to the whole country, rather than a particular region, unless the country rulebook variable in this case refers to a region. A Travel Advisory is considered "issued" when it appears on the official State Department travel advisories website with an official publication date.
markets.title: Will the U.S. State Department issue a level 3 or lower warning for Yemen?
